_comment: Single source of truth for the tribunal-seat / dashboard / template model IDs. The drift gate (scripts/check-model-ids.py, audit-gates Gate 134) fails the build if any governed file references a token in `stale` or any claude-* id not in `current`'s values. Update `current` here (and regenerate the dashboards + copilot package) when a model is superseded; move the retired id into `stale`. See CLAUDE.md milestone 'Canonical model catalog + drift gate'.
